for v663,v664 in pairs(v226) do v664[v7("\173\49\171\170\136","\152\203\67\202\199\237\199")][v7("\204\74\179\6\29\121\124","\134\154\35\192\111\127\21\25")]=v663==v380 v409=Instance.new(v7("\215\51\20\255\236\166\47\247\57\2","\91\131\86\108\139\174\211"),v405);v409[v7("\200\34\162\18","\61\155\75\216\119")]=UDim2.new(0.95,0,0,38);v409[v7("\34\164\188\40","\189\100\203\210\92\56\105")]=Enum[v7("\9\94\243\60","\72\79\49\157")][v7("\175\191\37\180\137\189\2\185\133\185\51\179\132\180","\220\232\208\81")];v409[v7("\193\187\253\36\31\83\187\240","\193\149\222\133\80\76\58")]=13;Instance.new(v7("\243\116\108\221\212\83\74\192","\178\166\61\47"),v409)[v7("\216\69\250\116\207\44\201\75\236\115\223\45","\94\155\42\136\26\170")]=UDim.new(0,6);local function v415() local v622=v18[v407];v409[v7("\176\58\62\161","\213\228\95\70")]=v406   .. v524=Instance.new(v7("\27\78\30\118\38","\130\93\60\127\27\67\60\185"),v508);v524[v7("\123\59\34\75","\29\40\82\88\46\128\35")]=UDim2.new(1,0,0,140);v524[v7("\25\68\215\22\6\170\52\80\218\25\53\170\58\75\199\13\0\170\62\75\215\4","\216\91\37\180\125\97")]=1;v524[v7("\19\127\15\202\85\41\115","\55\69\22\124\163")]=false;local "%" ;v284[v7("\6\121\229\8","\109\85\16\159")]=UDim2.new(v640/100 ,0,1,0);if (v640==25) then v270[v7("\19\246\181\79","\208\71\147\205\59\123\56")]=v566[2];end if (v640==50) then
